name: Apple MacBook Air 15-inch (M3)
description: The remarkably thin MacBook Air with the powerful M3 chip delivers exceptional performance and up to 18 hours of battery life. The stunning 15.3-inch Liquid Retina display is perfect for multitasking and media consumption.
features: Apple M3 chip with 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU
15.3-inch Liquid Retina display with 500 nits brightness
Up to 18 hours of battery life
1080p FaceTime HD camera with advanced image signal processor
MagSafe charging, two Thunderbolt ports, headphone jack

name: Dell XPS 16 9640 Laptop
description: The Dell XPS 16 combines a stunning InfinityEdge display with Intel Core Ultra processors for creative professionals. Its premium build quality and immersive 16-inch screen make it ideal for content creation and productivity.
features: Intel Core Ultra 7 155H processor
16-inch 16:10 OLED 3.2K display with touch
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 graphics
Precision haptic touchpad with zero-lattice keyboard
Thunderbolt 4 connectivity with Wi-Fi 7

name: HP Spectre x360 16-inch 2-in-1 Laptop
description: The HP Spectre x360 is a premium 2-in-1 convertible with a gorgeous 16-inch OLED display and Intel Core Ultra processing power. Its versatile 360-degree hinge lets you use it as a laptop, tablet, or presentation device.
features: Intel Core Ultra 7 155H processor
16-inch 3072 x 1920 OLED touchscreen display
360-degree convertible hinge design
HP MPP2.0 Tilt Pen included
Quad speaker system with Bang & Olufsen audio

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
description: The legendary ThinkPad X1 Carbon continues to set the standard for business ultrabooks with its renowned keyboard, robust security features, and exceptional portability. Now powered by Intel Core Ultra processors with AI capabilities.
features: Intel Core Ultra 7 155U vPro processor
14-inch 2.8K OLED display with low blue light
Iconic ThinkPad keyboard with TrackPoint
MIL-STD-810H tested for durability
Fingerprint reader and IR camera for Windows Hello

name: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G16 (2024) Gaming Laptop
description: The ASUS ROG Zephyrus G16 delivers desktop-class gaming performance in an impossibly thin chassis. Featuring an NVIDIA RTX 4070 and a stunning 240Hz OLED display, this is the ultimate portable gaming machine.
features: Intel Core Ultra 9 185H processor
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 8GB laptop GPU
16-inch ROG Nebula OLED 240Hz display
Ultra-slim 0.59-inch aluminum chassis
6-speaker system with Dolby Atmos support

name: Acer Swift Go 14 OLED Laptop
description: The Acer Swift Go 14 delivers premium features at a mid-range price, including a vibrant OLED display and Intel Core Ultra processing. Its lightweight design and long battery life make it perfect for students and professionals on the go.
features: Intel Core Ultra 5 125U processor
14-inch 2.8K OLED display with 100% DCI-P3
Lightweight 2.87 lb aluminum chassis
Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 5.4 connectivity
Backlit keyboard with fingerprint reader

name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 6 15-inch
description: The Microsoft Surface Laptop 6 offers a refined Windows experience with a beautiful PixelSense touchscreen and all-day battery life. Powered by Intel Core Ultra processors, it seamlessly integrates with the Microsoft 365 ecosystem.
features: Intel Core Ultra 7 155H processor
15-inch PixelSense touchscreen display
Premium Alcantara or metal finish options
Omnisonic speakers with Dolby Atmos
Windows Hello face authentication

name: Apple MacBook Pro 14-inch (M3 Pro)
description: The MacBook Pro 14-inch with M3 Pro chip delivers groundbreaking performance for demanding professional workflows. Its Liquid Retina XDR display with ProMotion technology provides a stunning visual experience for creative work.
features: Apple M3 Pro chip with 11-core CPU and 14-core GPU
14.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display with ProMotion
Up to 17 hours of battery life
Three Thunderbolt 4 ports, HDMI, SDXC card slot
Six-speaker sound system with Spatial Audio

name: Dell Inspiron Desktop 3030
description: The Dell Inspiron Desktop 3030 is a reliable everyday desktop that handles work, streaming, and casual gaming with ease. Its compact tower design fits neatly into any workspace while offering ample expandability.
features: 14th Gen Intel Core i7-14700 processor
Compact tower design with easy tool-free access
Multiple USB ports including USB-C
Wi-Fi 6E and Bluetooth 5.3 built-in
Easily upgradeable RAM and storage

name: HP OMEN 45L Gaming Desktop
description: The HP OMEN 45L is a powerhouse gaming desktop built for enthusiasts who demand top-tier performance. Its Cryo Chamber cooling technology and spacious tempered glass chassis keep temperatures low during intense gaming sessions.
features: Intel Core i9-14900K processor
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 SUPER graphics
Cryo Chamber liquid cooling technology
Tempered glass side panel with RGB lighting
Tool-free access for easy upgrades

name: Apple Mac mini (M3, 2024)
description: The Apple Mac mini with M3 chip packs incredible performance into its iconic compact design. Capable of supporting up to two displays, it is a versatile desktop solution for everyday tasks through creative workflows.
features: Apple M3 chip with 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU
Ultra-compact 7.75 x 7.75 inch design
Support for up to two displays
Two Thunderbolt 4 ports and two USB-A ports
Gigabit Ethernet with optional 10Gb upgrade

name: Lenovo Legion Tower 5i Gen 9
description: The Lenovo Legion Tower 5i Gen 9 is a mid-tower gaming desktop that delivers serious performance without breaking the bank. Its efficient airflow design with mesh front panel keeps components cool under pressure.
features: 14th Gen Intel Core i7-14700KF processor
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti graphics
Multi-zone RGB lighting with Lenovo Vantage control
Mesh front panel with optimized airflow design
Tool-less side panel for easy component access

name: Dell UltraSharp U2724D 27-inch QHD Monitor
description: The Dell UltraSharp U2724D is a professional-grade 27-inch IPS Black monitor that delivers exceptional color accuracy with 98% DCI-P3 coverage. Its virtually borderless design and extensive connectivity options make it ideal for professionals.
features: 27-inch QHD (2560 x 1440) IPS Black panel
98% DCI-P3 and 100% sRGB color coverage
120Hz refresh rate for smoother visuals
USB-C with 90W Power Delivery
Height-adjustable, tilt, swivel, and pivot stand

name: LG UltraGear 27GR95QE 27-inch OLED Gaming Monitor
description: The LG UltraGear OLED gaming monitor delivers the ultimate in picture quality with perfect blacks, infinite contrast, and a blazing 240Hz refresh rate. Its 0.03ms response time ensures zero ghosting in fast-paced games.
features: 27-inch QHD OLED panel with anti-glare coating
240Hz refresh rate with 0.03ms GtG response time
99.3% DCI-P3 color gamut coverage
NVIDIA G-Sync and AMD FreeSync Premium support
Anti-glare and low reflection treatment

name: Apple Studio Display (Standard Glass)
description: The Apple Studio Display features a stunning 27-inch 5K Retina screen with 600 nits of brightness and P3 wide color. With a built-in A13 Bionic chip powering advanced camera and audio features, it is the perfect companion for any Mac.
features: 27-inch 5K Retina display with 600 nits brightness
12MP Ultra Wide camera with Center Stage
Six-speaker sound system with Spatial Audio
Three USB-C ports and Thunderbolt 3 with 96W charging
Built-in A13 Bionic chip for camera and audio processing

name: ASUS ProArt PA278QV 27-inch WQHD Monitor
description: The ASUS ProArt PA278QV is a factory-calibrated professional monitor delivering accurate colors right out of the box. With 100% sRGB and Rec. 709 coverage, it is an excellent choice for photographers, designers, and video editors on a budget.
features: 27-inch WQHD (2560 x 1440) IPS panel
Calman Verified with Delta E < 2 color accuracy
100% sRGB and 100% Rec. 709 coverage
Ergonomic stand with height, tilt, swivel, and pivot
Extensive connectivity with HDMI, DP, mini-DP, and USB hub

name: Samsung 49-inch Odyssey OLED G9 Curved Gaming Monitor
description: The Samsung Odyssey OLED G9 is an ultra-wide 49-inch curved monitor that replaces a dual-monitor setup with a single immersive screen. Its DQHD resolution and 240Hz refresh rate deliver breathtaking visuals for gaming and productivity.
features: 49-inch 1800R curved OLED panel
DQHD (5120 x 1440) resolution, equivalent to dual 27-inch QHD
240Hz refresh rate with 0.03ms response time
AMD FreeSync Premium Pro and NVIDIA G-Sync compatible
Smart TV features with built-in apps and streaming

name: Logitech MX Keys S Combo Wireless Keyboard and Mouse
description: The Logitech MX Keys S Combo includes the MX Keys S keyboard and MX Master 3S mouse, providing a premium wireless productivity setup. Both devices feature multi-device connectivity and are optimized for comfortable all-day use.
features: MX Keys S low-profile wireless keyboard with smart backlighting
MX Master 3S mouse with 8K DPI sensor and quiet clicks
Connect to up to 3 devices via Bluetooth or Logi Bolt
Compatible with macOS, Windows, iPadOS, and ChromeOS
Includes MX Palm Rest for ergonomic keyboard use

specs.Battery (Mouse): Up to 70 days on full charge

name: CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt 4 Dock
description: The CalDigit TS4 is the most versatile Thunderbolt 4 dock available, offering 18 ports to connect all your peripherals through a single cable. It delivers up to 98W of charging power to your laptop while supporting dual 4K or single 8K displays.
features: 18 total ports including Thunderbolt 4, USB-A, USB-C, SD card
Up to 98W laptop charging through Thunderbolt 4
Supports dual 4K 60Hz or single 8K displays
2.5 Gigabit Ethernet for ultra-fast wired networking
Compatible with Thunderbolt 4, Thunderbolt 3, and USB4

name: Samsung 990 PRO 2TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe M.2 SSD
description: The Samsung 990 PRO delivers top-tier sequential read speeds of up to 7,450 MB/s powered by Samsung's proprietary controller. Designed for gamers and creative professionals, it provides the speed needed for demanding workloads and fast game loading.
features: Sequential read speeds up to 7,450 MB/s
Sequential write speeds up to 6,900 MB/s
Samsung V-NAND and proprietary Pascal controller
Advanced thermal control with nickel-coated controller
AES 256-bit hardware encryption
